mappings.control_id: System prompt extraction via crafted inputs
mappings.notes: Attempt to extract system prompt contents through direct requests, indirect summarisation, translation, and instruction-override techniques

mappings.control_id: Credential and sensitive content in system prompt
mappings.notes: Verify that credentials, API keys, or sensitive business logic in the system prompt are not reproducible by any input technique

mappings.control_id: API keys or tokens embedded in system prompt
mappings.notes: Scan system prompts for credential patterns before deployment

mappings.control_id: System prompt stored as plaintext config with embedded credentials
mappings.notes: Externalise credentials to vault; reference by ID in system prompt

mappings.control_name: Protect all code from unauthorised access — system prompt confidentiality
mappings.notes: Classify system prompts as sensitive configuration artefacts; apply access controls, version control, and audit logging to all prompt stores

mappings.control_name: Secure coding — no credentials in prompts
mappings.notes: Enforce secure coding standards prohibiting embedding of credentials, API keys, or sensitive configuration data in system prompts or model context

mappings.control_name: Review for security vulnerabilities — prompt disclosure
mappings.notes: Include system prompt extraction scenarios in pre-release security reviews; verify that outputs cannot reveal system prompt content

mappings.control_name: Test for security vulnerabilities — prompt extraction
mappings.notes: Conduct adversarial prompt extraction testing against all known extraction techniques before deployment and after each system prompt change

mappings.control_name: Protection of Information at Rest — system prompt confidentiality
mappings.notes: Classify system prompts as sensitive configuration; encrypt at rest, enforce access controls, and apply version control and audit logging to all prompt stores
Restrict access to system prompt configurations to authorised personnel; enforce role-based access control and change management on all prompt modifications
Log inference interactions with sufficient detail to detect system prompt extraction attempts; alert on query patterns indicative of extraction techniques

mappings.control_name: Malicious Code Protection — prompt extraction defence
mappings.notes: Deploy output monitoring to detect and block responses containing system prompt content; treat extraction as a security event
Classify system prompts as sensitive ICT configuration; implement protection controls including encryption, access control, and output monitoring to prevent extraction

mappings.control_name: ICT Incident Management — prompt extraction reporting
mappings.notes: Classify successful system prompt extraction as an ICT-related incident; assess impact and report per DORA incident classification criteria
Conduct post-incident analysis for prompt extraction events; identify root cause, assess business impact, and update protection controls
Deploy detection mechanisms for system prompt extraction attempts; monitor inference requests for extraction technique patterns
